response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the final lines of 'Don't say 'lazy''. The JSON contained the full song lyrics, but I have discarded the unused lines as the clip starts at the very end of the performance. Verified the speech segments which transition between Japanese, Indonesian, and English. Subtitles are tightly synchronized to vocal audio, with instrumentals and pauses left silent. Long spoken phrases have been split for readability under the 50-character limit.
